zh.Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭音巴內-爾洛姆丘斯

zh.lifeSummary: 當Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh於1202年出生時，他的父親William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh32歲，母親Beatrice Learmouth17歲。他和Helen Calder至少有5個兒子。他去世於1265年享年63歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Inverness, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰音巴內-爾音巴內斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh于1202年出生时，他的父亲William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh32岁，母亲Beatrice Learmouth17岁。他和Helen Calder至少有5个儿子。他去世于1265年享年63岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mackintosh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McIntosh
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Toisich ‘son of the chief’. Compare Mackintosh .

History: Clan Mackintosh is a Highland Scottish clan claiming descent from Shaw McDuff, a 12th-century chief (second son of Duncan, Earl of Fife), who established the traditional family seat at Perry, Morays. The chiefs of Clan Mackintosh have been regarded as leaders of the Chattan Confederation since 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Shaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name meaning ‘wood, copse’ (Old English sceaga, Old Norse skógr).

en.lifeSummary: When Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh was born in 1202, his father, William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh, was 32 and his mother, Beatrice Learmouth, was 17. He had at least 5 sons with Helen Calder. He died in 1265, at the age of 63, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh est né en 1202, son père, William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Learmouth, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Helen Calder. Il est décédé en 1265, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh 1202 geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh 32 und seine Mutter Beatrice Learmouth 17. Er hatte mit Helen Calder mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1265 im Alter von 63 Jahren und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh è nato il nel 1202, il suo padre, William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Learmouth, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Helen Calder. Morì nel 1265, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintoshが1202年に生まれた時，父William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintoshは32歳，母Beatrice Learmouthは17歳であった。彼はHelen Calderとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1265年に63歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh(이)가 1202년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Learmouth(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Helen Calder(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1265년 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdo: Siorrachd Inbhir Nis, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Dundee, Angus, Scotland: Dùn Dè, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh nasceu em 1202, seu pai, William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Learmouth, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Helen Calder. Ele faleceu em 1265, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh родился в 1202 г., его отцу по имени William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Learmouth, 17. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Helen Calder. Он умер в 1265 г. в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

sm.from 1202 to 1265: mai le 1202 e o'o I le 1265

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh nació en 1202, su papá, William Mackintosh, 3rd Chief of Clan Mackintosh, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Beatrice Learmouth, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Helen Calder. Murió en 1265, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
